PLTF WILLIAM DAVIS REQUEST TO CONTINUE HRG DATE TO FEB 28, 2000 AT 6:30 PM SUBMITTED TO THE COMM. FOR APPROVAL. PLTF PAID COURT FEE OF $10.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAVIS, WILLIAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ABLE CREDIT SERVICES INC.
